P25 Phase 1 full-rate IMBE w/FEC. Project label: p25_fullrate. Not in AMBE-3000 chip rate-index table 7.2 (Appendix 7.2); invoked via RCW 0x0558 0x086B 0x1030. L-dependent widths: see annex_f_gain_allocation.csv (gain) and annex_g_hoc_allocation.csv (HOC) in BABA-A. FEC: 4x[23,12] Golay (u0-u3) + 3x[15,11] Hamming (u4-u6) + 7 uncoded (u7) + 1 parity (BABA-A §6).
P25 full-rate IMBE no-FEC. Project label: p25_fullrate-nofec. RCW 0x0558 0x086B 0x0000. Same bit fields as chip 62 row.
